author: Jorge Asenjo
name: 11L INT7 + MuonWD + SWA
blurb: 11 unique layers at d=512 with INT7 quantization (7-bit, 127 levels per row with percentile clipping). Muon weight decay 0.04, SWA checkpoint averaging. INT7 is a sweet spot: only 0.02 bpb degradation vs 0.12 for INT6. Preliminary result on 1xH100/5min; pending 8xH100/10min re-run.
note: Preliminary: 1xH100/5min (710 steps). Expect significant improvement on 8xH100/10min (~12000 steps).
